actions.name: create_design
actions.description: Create a new Canva design from a preset type, custom dimensions, an optional image asset, an existing design, or a brand template.

type.description: The Canva create-design mode for type and asset creation.

width.description: The width of the design in pixels.

height.description: The height of the design in pixels.

oneOf.description: A custom Canva design type with pixel dimensions.

designType.description: The Canva design type to create.

assetId.description: The Canva image asset ID to insert into the created design.

title.description: The name of the created Canva design.

oneOf.description: Create a Canva design by specifying a preset or custom design type and optionally inserting an image asset.

type.description: The Canva create-design mode for copying a design.

designId.description: The Canva design ID to copy.

pageNumbers.description: The 1-based page numbers to copy from the source design. Omit to copy every page.

oneOf.description: Create a copy of an existing Canva design.

type.description: The Canva create-design mode for copying a brand template.

brandTemplateId.description: The Canva brand template ID to copy.

pageNumbers.description: The 1-based page numbers to copy from the brand template. Omit to copy every page.

oneOf.description: Create a Canva design from a brand template.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for creating a Canva design. For type_and_asset mode, designType or assetId is required.

anyOf.description: The Canva design title when returned.
The Canva URL for editing the design when returned.
The Canva URL for viewing the design when returned.
The Canva thumbnail URL when returned.
The thumbnail width in pixels when returned.
The thumbnail height in pixels when returned.
The Canva owner user ID when returned.
The Canva owner team ID when returned.
The design creation timestamp when returned.
The design update timestamp when returned.

design.description: A normalized Canva design metadata record.

actions.name: create_design_export_job
actions.description: Start an asynchronous Canva export job for a design and return the job handle for polling.

designId.description: The Canva design ID to export.

size.description: The PDF size option when exporting PDF.

pages.description: The 1-based design page numbers to export when Canva supports page selection.

exportQuality.description: The export quality option when Canva supports it.

width.description: The exported image width in pixels when Canva supports it.

height.description: The exported image height in pixels when Canva supports it.

anyOf.description: The JPG compression quality from 1 to 100.
The MP4 export quality.

quality.description: The required quality field for JPG or MP4 exports.

lossless.description: Whether Canva should export a PNG without lossy compression.

transparentBackground.description: Whether the exported PNG should use a transparent background when supported.

asSingleImage.description: Whether Canva should merge a multi-page PNG export into one image.

format.description: The Canva export format request. The fields map to Canva's documented export format object. Quality is required for Canva JPG and MP4 exports.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for creating a Canva design export job.

urls.description: The generated download URLs for a successful export job.

anyOf.description: The Canva error code for a failed export job.
The Canva error message for a failed export job.

outputSchema.description: The Canva design export job creation response.

actions.name: create_folder
actions.description: Create a Canva folder at the top level, in uploads, or inside another folder.

parentFolderId.description: The parent folder ID, root for the top-level projects area, or uploads for the user's Uploads folder.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for creating a Canva folder.

anyOf.description: The Canva folder name when returned.
The Canva folder title or legacy title when returned.
The Canva folder URL when returned.
The Canva folder thumbnail URL when returned.
The thumbnail width in pixels when returned.
The thumbnail height in pixels when returned.
The folder creation timestamp when returned.
The folder update timestamp when returned.

folder.description: A normalized Canva folder metadata record.

actions.name: create_url_asset_upload_job
actions.description: Start an asynchronous Canva asset upload job from a publicly accessible URL and return the job handle for polling.

name.description: The asset name shown in Canva.

url.description: The publicly accessible URL of the file to upload to Canva.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for uploading a Canva asset from a URL.

id.description: The Canva asset upload job ID.

status.description: The Canva asset upload job status.

anyOf.description: The Canva asset type when returned.
The Canva asset name when returned.

tags.description: The user-facing tags attached to the asset.

anyOf.description: The Canva asset thumbnail URL when returned.
The thumbnail width in pixels when returned.
The thumbnail height in pixels when returned.
The Canva owner user ID when returned.
The Canva owner team ID when returned.
The asset creation timestamp when returned.
The asset update timestamp when returned.

state.description: The Canva asset import status state.

anyOf.description: The Canva import error code when the import failed.
The Canva import error message when the import failed.
The deprecated Canva asset import status when returned.
The metadata type when returned.
The image or video width in pixels when returned.
The image or video height in pixels when returned.
The video duration in seconds when returned.

smartTags.description: The AI-generated smart tags returned for an image asset.

anyOf.description: Type-specific Canva asset metadata when returned.
A normalized Canva asset metadata record.
The Canva error code for a failed asset upload job.
The Canva error message for a failed asset upload job.

job.description: A normalized Canva asset upload job.

outputSchema.description: The Canva URL asset upload job creation response.

actions.name: get_asset
actions.description: Get metadata for a Canva asset, including owner, thumbnail, and type-specific metadata.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for retrieving one Canva asset.

anyOf.description: The Canva asset type when returned.
The Canva asset name when returned.

tags.description: The user-facing tags attached to the asset.

anyOf.description: The Canva asset thumbnail URL when returned.
The thumbnail width in pixels when returned.
The thumbnail height in pixels when returned.
The Canva owner user ID when returned.
The Canva owner team ID when returned.
The asset creation timestamp when returned.
The asset update timestamp when returned.

state.description: The Canva asset import status state.

anyOf.description: The Canva import error code when the import failed.
The Canva import error message when the import failed.
The deprecated Canva asset import status when returned.
The metadata type when returned.
The image or video width in pixels when returned.
The image or video height in pixels when returned.
The video duration in seconds when returned.

smartTags.description: The AI-generated smart tags returned for an image asset.

anyOf.description: Type-specific Canva asset metadata when returned.

asset.description: A normalized Canva asset metadata record.

outputSchema.description: The normalized Canva asset metadata response.

actions.name: get_current_user
actions.description: Get the Canva user and profile associated with the current OAuth token.

inputSchema.description: No input is required for this action.

anyOf.description: The Canva team ID when returned.
The Canva display name when returned.

outputSchema.description: The normalized Canva current user profile.

actions.name: get_design
actions.description: Get metadata for a Canva design, including owner, URLs, and thumbnail details.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for retrieving one Canva design.

anyOf.description: The Canva design title when returned.
The Canva URL for editing the design when returned.
The Canva URL for viewing the design when returned.
The Canva thumbnail URL when returned.
The thumbnail width in pixels when returned.
The thumbnail height in pixels when returned.
The Canva owner user ID when returned.
The Canva owner team ID when returned.
The design creation timestamp when returned.
The design update timestamp when returned.

design.description: A normalized Canva design metadata record.

outputSchema.description: The normalized Canva design metadata response.

actions.name: get_design_export_formats
actions.description: List the file formats currently available for exporting a Canva design.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for listing Canva design export formats.

formats.description: The raw Canva export format objects supported by this design.

outputSchema.description: The Canva design export format response.

actions.name: get_design_export_job
actions.description: Get the current status and result URLs for a Canva design export job created by create_design_export_job.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for retrieving a Canva design export job.

urls.description: The generated download URLs for a successful export job.

anyOf.description: The Canva error code for a failed export job.
The Canva error message for a failed export job.

outputSchema.description: The Canva design export job response.

actions.name: get_url_asset_upload_job
actions.description: Get the current status and uploaded asset metadata for a Canva URL asset upload job.

jobId.description: The Canva asset upload job ID.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for retrieving a Canva URL asset upload job.

id.description: The Canva asset upload job ID.

status.description: The Canva asset upload job status.

anyOf.description: The Canva asset type when returned.
The Canva asset name when returned.

tags.description: The user-facing tags attached to the asset.

anyOf.description: The Canva asset thumbnail URL when returned.
The thumbnail width in pixels when returned.
The thumbnail height in pixels when returned.
The Canva owner user ID when returned.
The Canva owner team ID when returned.
The asset creation timestamp when returned.
The asset update timestamp when returned.

state.description: The Canva asset import status state.

anyOf.description: The Canva import error code when the import failed.
The Canva import error message when the import failed.
The deprecated Canva asset import status when returned.
The metadata type when returned.
The image or video width in pixels when returned.
The image or video height in pixels when returned.
The video duration in seconds when returned.

smartTags.description: The AI-generated smart tags returned for an image asset.

anyOf.description: Type-specific Canva asset metadata when returned.
A normalized Canva asset metadata record.
The Canva error code for a failed asset upload job.
The Canva error message for a failed asset upload job.

job.description: A normalized Canva asset upload job.

actions.name: list_designs
actions.description: List metadata for the current Canva user's designs, with optional search, ownership, sorting, and pagination filters.

query.description: A search term for filtering designs.

continuation.description: The continuation token returned by a previous list_designs call.

ownership.description: Filter designs by the current user's ownership.

sortBy.description: The Canva sort order for the design list.

limit.description: The maximum number of designs to return.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for listing Canva design metadata.

anyOf.description: The Canva design title when returned.
The Canva URL for editing the design when returned.
The Canva URL for viewing the design when returned.
The Canva thumbnail URL when returned.
The thumbnail width in pixels when returned.
The thumbnail height in pixels when returned.
The Canva owner user ID when returned.
The Canva owner team ID when returned.
The design creation timestamp when returned.
The design update timestamp when returned.

items.description: A normalized Canva design metadata record.

designs.description: The normalized Canva designs returned in this page.

anyOf.description: The continuation token to request the next page when available.

actions.name: list_folder_items
actions.description: List Canva folder contents, including folders, designs, and image assets, with pagination and filtering options.

folderId.description: The Canva folder ID to list.

continuation.description: The continuation token returned by a previous list_folder_items call.

limit.description: The maximum number of folder items to return.

itemTypes.description: The Canva folder item types to include.

sortBy.description: The Canva sort order for folder items.

pinStatus.description: Filter folder items by pinned status.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for listing Canva folder items.

anyOf.description: The item name when the item is a folder or asset.
The item title or display name when returned.
The Canva URL for the item when returned.
The Canva item thumbnail URL when returned.
The thumbnail width in pixels when returned.
The thumbnail height in pixels when returned.
The item creation timestamp when returned.
The item update timestamp when returned.

items.description: The normalized Canva folder items returned in this page.

anyOf.description: The continuation token to request the next page when available.

outputSchema.description: A Canva folder item listing page.

actions.name: move_folder_item
actions.description: Move a Canva folder item to another Canva folder.

itemId.description: The Canva item ID to move.

toFolderId.description: The destination Canva folder ID, or root for the top-level projects area.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for moving a Canva folder item.

moved.description: Whether Canva accepted the move request.

itemId.description: The Canva item ID that was moved.

outputSchema.description: A Canva folder item move acknowledgement.
